name: software_engineer_test
job_description: Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in Python. Must have experience with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and cloud services like AWS. Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and containerization with Docker is required.
resume_content:
John Smith
Senior Software Engineer

SUMMARY
Experienced software engineer with 6 years of expertise in Python development, FastAPI, and AWS cloud services. Proficient in designing and implementing CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and containerizing applications with Docker.

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, SQL
Frameworks: FastAPI, Flask, React
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda)
Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Git, GitHub Actions

EXPERIENCE
Senior Software Engineer | Tech Solutions Inc. | 2020-Present
- Developed and maintained RESTful APIs using FastAPI, serving 10k+ daily users
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 70%
- Containerized legacy applications using Docker, improving scalability

Software Engineer | DataCorp | 2017-2020
- Built data processing pipelines using Python and AWS Lambda
- Managed PostgreSQL databases with 100+ tables and complex queries
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on time

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science | University of Technology | 2017
